Job Application

This form has been modified since it was saved. Please review all fields before submitting.

* indicates a required field

Steps

  1. 1. Application for Employment(current) This section is complete This section is incomplete
  2. 2. Personal Information This section is complete This section is incomplete

  5. 5. References This section is complete This section is incomplete

  • Application for Employment

    2. Application for Employment
    5. Thank you for your interest in joining us!

      We are currently transitioning between online application systems.  We appreciate your understanding as we work through the transition and implement our new software.    

      This is our temporary application form, which will only be used temporarily during this transition and will be discontinued once our new online application is available.

      Below are some instructions and suggestions on successfully completing and submitting your application.  If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us at jobs@fremontne.gov for assistance. 

      We gladly accept applications for posted vacancies.  A separate application is required for each position for which you are applying.  We are not able to accept applications for positions that are not currently posted as a vacancy, any application that is not for a specific position (i.e. for “Any position”), or applications submitted for multiple positions.

    7. Where Do I Find Current Vacancies?

      Currently available positions are posted in the Employment section of our website (www.fremontne.gov).  By clicking on a position title, you may view the posted job description.  If you would like to be considered for the position, please complete this application and list the job title from the job posting in the “Position Desired” field on your application.  To make sure your application is placed into consideration for the correct position, copy the job title exactly as it appears in the job posting.

      All positions are open until filled unless a closing date is listed on the posting.

      Once a position is no longer posted on our website, we will not accept applications for that vacancy.

    9. Instructions for Completing the Application

      Please read these instructions carefully.  You may print or copy them to refer back to while you are completing your application.

      1. Before you start, please make sure that you have all of the following information available:

      1. The job title for the position you are applying for.  You will need the job title exactly as it appears on the job posting for your application.
      2. Your contact information
      3. Three professional references (name, phone number or email)
      4. Your education information (school and degree or diploma obtained)
      5. Your entire employment history (Employer names, locations and phone or email address; your job title; supervisor names; and dates of employment.  You will also be asked to provide a summary of your job responsibilities and your reason for leaving each position.)
      6. A list of any job-related skills, certifications, qualifications, etc. that you would like to provide on your application.

      2.  Complete the application by filling in all fields.  Every field is required. 

      1. If you do not have information to provide in any field, please enter “N/A” to indicate the requested information does not apply to you.

      3. Indicate the position you are interested in by entering the job title in the “Position Desired” field. 

      1. You may only apply for one position per application.  If you would like to apply for multiple positions, please submit a separate application for each position.

      4. Please do not enter “See resume” in lieu of providing the requested information. 

      5. You must complete each section of the application prior to moving to the next section.  

      6. Once you move on to the next section you will not be able to go back to a previous section until you have completed the entire application.  Once you have completed each field on the form, you will be able to go back and adjust information on any section before you submit.  Once you hit the “Submit” button at the bottom of the References section, you will not be able to make any further changes to your application.

      7. A completed application must be submitted to be considered. Resumes submitted in lieu of an application will not be considered.

    11. Checking The Status of My Application

      Unfortunately, due to the number of applications we receive we are unable to confirm receipt of every application. We also ask that you refrain from calling to check on the status of your application.

      Once your application has been reviewed by the hiring manager and we have an update regarding your application, you will be contacted via email or phone.  In some cases, this may take several weeks, but you will be contacted once we have an update for you.

      If you have any additional questions, please contact us at jobs@fremontne.gov. 

      AN EQUAL OPPORTUNITY EMPLOYER It is the policy of the City of Fremont to implement affirmatively equal opportunity to all qualified employees and applicants for employment, without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, marital status, disability, or other status protected by Federal or State law.

    13. Continue

    74. If you have additional employment history, please submit a resume or supplemental document that provides all of the above information for your additional employment. Your resume or supplemental document may be attached at the end of this application.

    References

    2. Professional References (Three References are Required)

      (Please do not list personal references, only provide contacts who have knowledge of your work.) 

    30. Applications will only be considered for open positions and may only be considered for the position listed on the first page. A new application must be submitted for each position you would like to be considered for.
    32. I authorize investigation of all statements contained in this application. I understand that misrepresentation or omission of facts requested within this application or at any point and time during the selection/onboarding process or during my employment is cause for ineligibility for hire, offer of employment being rescinded, or dismissal. I understand and agree that my employment may be covered by the City’s agreement with a localized union. Successful completion of medical examinations and/or drug and/or alcohol testing is a condition of my employment. All offers of employment are contingent upon the successful completion of all applicable medical examinations and/or drug and/or alcohol testing.
    34. I hereby give consent to any and all prior employers of mine to provide information with regard to my employment with current and/or prior employers to the City of Fremont.
      43. Leave This Blank:
